---
title: "user_feedback.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/user_feedback.py"
loc: 31
complexity: 3
logic_score: 6.82
style_score: 3.78
intel_score: 9.14
overall_score: 6.34
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating FeedbackOrchestrator, execute.

## Interaction Protocol
Import FeedbackOrchestrator and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [datetime](file://datetime)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
- `FeedbackOrchestrator`
- `execute`
